From the heart

A letter to my love

Millie, from the moment you walked into my life, every ordinary day became something worth remembering. You are the calm I return to, the laugh I cannot hold in, and the warmth I never want to leave. I built this little corner of the internet just for us — a place where our story lives, where no one else gets in, and where I get to remind you, every single time you visit, that you are everything.

This is just the beginning of what we are building together. And I would choose you again, in every version of this life.

— Always yours, Jay

Just us

The inside jokes, the quiet mornings, the moments no one else will ever fully understand.

Time well spent

Every day with you counts

Days of loving you

What I promise you

Always and always

  • 01 To make you feel chosen — not just once, but every single day we have together.
  • 02 To be the person who shows up when it matters and stays when it is hard.
  • 03 To keep laughing with you — because you make everything lighter.
  • 04 To build something real, something beautiful, and something entirely ours.

Written from the heart

Our letters

🖤

Jay to Millie

A letter I mean every word of

Millie, you are the kind of person who makes the whole room feel different when you walk in. Not because of how you look — though you are stunning — but because of how you make everyone around you feel seen. You did that to me too. You saw me before I even knew I wanted to be found. I love you for that. I love you for every small, quiet, enormous thing you are. I am the luckiest person alive and I will spend every day making sure you know it.

🖤

Jay to Millie

On the days that are hard

When things feel heavy, I want you to come here and read this: you are doing amazingly. You are stronger than you think, more loved than you know, and never — not for a single second — alone. I am right here. I will always be right here. Lean on me whenever you need to. That is what I am for. We will get through everything together. That is the deal. That is forever.
